project_description: Design and lead fun arts activities/workshop for underprivileged children in the weekends

organization.name: Art Mentor Education Foundation
organization.description: AMEF aims to create a safe and effective platform for children and teenagers to enhance their artistic creativity and to promote self-development. We as a foundation strongly encourages young people to step out of their comfort zone, communicate with different social strata, learn from one another, and inspire one another as well. Through experiential learning while inheriting strong Chinese and Hong Kong culture, AMEF's goal is to help young people build confidence, develop leadership and teamwork skills, and most importantly, learn to give back to society.

what_we_need: These free workshops can be done with any art related topics, e.g. dancing, singing, arts and crafts etc.
Volunteers will come up with a simple proposal of the activities/ workshop for 8-10 underprivileged students
Workshops are held during the weekends throughout 2025 (you can pick any weekend) and we are recruiting volunteers on a rolling basis
We have reference of previous workshop on our website
We will share the proposal template and provide further details
Certificate of appreciation and website featuring will be offered to volunteers who have completes the workshops
project_details.background: We are organizing new workshops in 2025 to include underprivileged kids into the community. We hope to provide them with more fun activities/classes for free outside from school. The project is on a rolling basis, which means the activities can be held on any weekends throughout 2025, we will keep recruiting volunteers throughout the year. Initially, you only have to pick one day to hold your workshop, but we welcome long term partnership as well!
project_details.what_we_have: We will be responsible for getting the resources you need for the workshop. A template of previous proposal will also be provided for reference. You can refer to our website for the previous workshops we held: https://amef.org.hk/zh/pages/art-and-culture-programme
project_details.why_important: Providing free art workshops for underprivileged kids

similar_opportunities.title: 每週於固定時間及地點教基層學童彈鋼琴
希望透過唱詩歌、學習聖經故事等活動,幫助小朋友在童年時認識神
Assist lead teacher and support classroom management
